scripts.build: vite build && rm -rf dist/bomber-tribe dist/metro-vice-96 dist/contraption-lab && cp -R public/bomber-tribe dist/bomber-tribe && cp -R public/metro-vice-96 dist/metro-vice-96 && cp -R public/contraption-lab dist/contraption-lab && test -f dist/bomber-tribe/index.html && test -f dist/metro-vice-96/index.html && test -f dist/contraption-lab/index.html
